headlines.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’
headlines.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

headlines.title: Four swing House races in Pennsylvania loom large for both parties — and for 2028, too
headlines.description: Control of the House of Representatives could come down to four pivotal battleground races in Pennsylvania

headlines.title: Detroit-Bound Plane Diverted to Canada Over Ebola Concerns
headlines.description: An Air France flight headed to Detroit suddenly diverted to Canada over concerns that a Congolese passenger may have been exposed to Ebola. Meanwhile, the American doctor who tested positive for the virus is now in stable condition, according to the CDC. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Walmart says U.S. consumers are under pressure from rising costs
headlines.description: Walmart reported positive earnings, but U.S. consumers are struggling with rising costs.

headlines.title: As the stock market nears record highs, another corner of Wall Street flashes warning signs
headlines.description: The stock market is near record highs, but there’s another corner of Wall Street that’s flashing warning signs: the bond market

headlines.title: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says Castro indictment is 'big step forward'
headlines.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche discusses the indictment of former Cuban President Raúl Castro, charged with the 1996 downing of two civilian planes. He called the move a "big step forward" for Cuban Americans.

headlines.title: Teacher’s assistant at San Diego mosque recalls students’ bravery as gunmen banged on doors
headlines.description: Like schools across the U.S., the Islamic Center of San Diego had sought to prepare its students for the possibility that a gunman could breach its walls.

headlines.title: Comedian and businessman Byron Allen on future of late night
headlines.description: As Stephen Colbert says goodbye at CBS, Byron Allen steps into the coveted slot with "Comics Unleashed." NBC News' Chloe Melas sat down with him to talk about his deal, media empire, and plans for a new era of network comedy.

headlines.title: New Weight Loss Drug Retatrutide Delivers Stunning Results
headlines.description: Remarkable new test results by drugmaker Eli Lilly reveal that their latest weight loss drug, retatrutide, may be even more effective than the three popular GLP-1s currently available. The new drug is designed to mimic three hormones responsible for hunger regulation and fat burning. NBC’s medical contributor Dr. Natalie Azar breaks down the trial results and discusses how soon the new drug is likely to get FDA approval.

headlines.title: Patrick Stewart, AI and I encountered the Bard. Resistance was futile.
headlines.description: My journey through Shakespeare was guided by “Star Trek” star Patrick Stewart, who just recorded a new audiobook of the sonnets, and Claude AI.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: SpaceX to launch an even bigger Starship prototype
headlines.description: SpaceX is set to launch a new prototype of its Starship megarocket on a key test flight Thursday — one that could take astronauts back to the moon
